suite.name: Main

test.name: Sap autoamtion all type

kw.name: SAP Flow Identification Process
Prepare Working Environment
Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Remove Directory
kw.doc: Removes the directory pointed to by the given ``path``.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.msg: Created directory 'C:\Temp\RPA0032_INDIA\FX Payment File'.
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix
Initializes project folder structure and copies template files

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: Copy File
kw.doc: Copies the source file into the destination.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Initialize SAP System HP1
Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Wait For Element
kw.doc: Wait for an element defined by locator to exist, or raise a TimeoutException if none were found within timeout.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.arg: SAP Logon started successfully for HP1
kw.doc: Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Connect To Session
kw.doc: Connects to an open session SAP.

kw.name: Open Connection
kw.doc: Opens a connection to the given connection name. Be sure to provide the full connection name, including the bracket part.

kw.name: Disable Screenshots On Error
kw.doc: Disables automatic screenshots on error.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix
Kills existing SAP processes and launches SAP Logon

kw.name: Login To SAP Application PP5
Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Inserts the given text into the text field identified by locator. Use keyword `input password` to insert a password in a text field.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.doc: Inserts the given password into the text field identified by locator. The password is not recorded in the log.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Inserts the given text into the text field identified by locator. Use keyword `input password` to insert a password in a text field.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Inserts the given text into the text field identified by locator. Use keyword `input password` to insert a password in a text field.

kw.name: Send Vkey
kw.doc: Sends a SAP virtual key combination to the window, not into an element. If you want to send a value to a text field, use `input text` instead.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix
Performs SAP login with credentials

kw.name: Load Transaction Screen F110 HP1
Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Run Transaction
kw.doc: Runs a Sap transaction. An error is given when an unknown transaction is specified.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix
Opens the FX Invoice Monitor transaction

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Add Time To Date
kw.doc: Adds time to date and returns the resulting date.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.

kw.name: Split String
kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
Logs message to console with timestamp prefix

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Element Should Be Present
kw.doc: Checks whether an element is present on the screen.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Set Focus
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the given element.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Inserts the given text into the text field identified by locator. Use keyword `input password` to insert a password in a text field.

Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Send Vkey
kw.doc: Sends a SAP virtual key combination to the window, not into an element. If you want to send a value to a text field, use `input text` instead.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Inserts the given text into the text field identified by locator. Use keyword `input password` to insert a password in a text field.

kw.name: Set Focus
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the given element.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Performs a single click on a given element. Used only for buttons, tabs and menu items.

kw.name: Get Value
kw.msg: ${no_data_found} = Control (amodal) search help could not be initialized
kw.doc: Gets the value of the given element. The possible return values depend on the type of element (see Return values).

kw.doc: Press multiple keys down simultaneously.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait For Element
kw.doc: Wait for an element defined by locator to exist, or raise a TimeoutException if none were found within timeout.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console With Timestamp
Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Send Vkey
kw.doc: Sends a SAP virtual key combination to the window, not into an element. If you want to send a value to a text field, use `input text` instead.

kw.name: Main Workflow RPA0032 PP5
Initialize SAP System PP5
Close SAP
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.
Kills existing SAP processes and launches SAP Logon

kw.name: Start Process
kw.doc: Starts a new process on background.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Connect To Session
kw.doc: Connects to an open session SAP.

kw.name: Open Connection
kw.doc: Opens a connection to the given connection name. Be sure to provide the full connection name, including the bracket part.

kw.doc: Disables automatic screenshots on error.

kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.doc: Inserts the given text into the text field identified by locator. Use keyword `input password` to insert a password in a text field.

kw.doc: Inserts the given password into the text field identified by locator. The password is not recorded in the log.
